segments.text: Summit Tire and Brake, how can I help you?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Hi, I've got a 2017 Ford F-150 and my brakes are squealing pretty bad. Can I get them looked at today?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: We can squeeze you in around 2 o'clock. It'll be a free inspection.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Great. What's the typical cost if I need new pads and rotors?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: For the F-150, front pads and rotors run about $380. If you need rears too, it's around $700 for all four.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Okay, that's not too bad. I'll be there at 2.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Sounds good. Can I get a name for the appointment?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Got it. See you at 2. Drive safe.
segments.speaker: remote party

transcription.text: Summit Tire and Brake, how can I help you? Hi, I've got a 2017 Ford F-150 and my brakes are squealing pretty bad. Can I get them looked at today? We can squeeze you in around 2 o'clock. It'll be a free inspection. Great. What's the typical cost if I need new pads and rotors? For the F-150, front pads and rotors run about $380. If you need rears too, it's around $700 for all four. Okay, that's not too bad. I'll be there at 2. Sounds good. Can I get a name for the appointment? [NAME], phone number [PHONE_NUMBER]. Got it. See you at 2. Drive safe. Thanks, bye.
transcription.summary:
## Call Summary

Customer with a 2017 Ford F-150 called about squealing brakes. Free inspection scheduled at 2 PM. Quoted $380 for front pads/rotors, $700 for all four.

**Action Items:**
- Brake inspection at 2 PM for F-150.
